User.title: User
User.description: A user of the Community Hero platform.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user (same as document ID).

community.description: The community area the user belongs to (e.g. 'Community A', 'Local').

Issue.title: Issue
Issue.description: A community issue reported by a citizen.

userId.description: ID of the user who reported the issue.

description.description: Detailed description of the community issue.

address.description: Typed address or location of the issue.

mediaUrl.description: Url to image placeholder or uploaded media.

category.description: AI-categorized issue type (e.g., Pothole, Water Leakage, Waste Management, Damaged Streetlight).

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp or server timestamp of when the issue was reported.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles containing XP and credentials for login.
